scripts.test:node:
mkdir -p test-result coverage/node-v8 && NODE_V8_COVERAGE=coverage/node-v8 node --import tsx --test --experimental-test-coverage --test-reporter=spec --test-reporter-destination=stdout --test-reporter=junit --test-reporter-destination=test-result/node-junit.xml tests/*.test.ts && node --input-type=module -e 'import { readFileSync, writeFileSync } from "node:fs"; const path = "test-result/node-junit.xml"; const xml = readFileSync(path, "utf8"); const tests = (xml.match(new RegExp(String.raw`<!-- tests (\d+) -->`)) ?? [])[1] ?? "0"; const failures = (xml.match(new RegExp(String.raw`<!-- fail (\d+) -->`)) ?? [])[1] ?? "0"; const skipped = (xml.match(new RegExp(String.raw`<!-- skipped (\d+) -->`)) ?? [])[1] ?? "0"; const durationMs = Number((xml.match(new RegExp(String.raw`<!-- duration_ms ([\d.]+) -->`)) ?? [])[1] ?? "0"); const time = (durationMs / 1000).toFixed(6); const body = xml.replace(new RegExp(String.raw`^<\?xml[^>]*>\s*<testsuites>\s*`), "").replace(new RegExp(String.raw`\s*</testsuites>\s*$`), ""); writeFileSync(path, `<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<testsuite name="Node Tests" tests="${tests}" failures="${failures}" skipped="${skipped}" time="${time}">
${body}
</testsuite>
`);' && npx c8 report --temp-directory coverage/node-v8 --reporter=lcovonly --report-dir test-result/node-coverage
scripts.test:bun: mkdir -p test-result test-result/bun-coverage && bun test --coverage --coverage-reporter=text --coverage-reporter=lcov --coverage-dir=test-result/bun-coverage --reporter=junit --reporter-outfile=test-result/bun-junit.xml tests/*.test.ts
